'''ât-r-t''' ('''tarata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:breadthen|breadthen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-r-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:breadthen|breadthen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-r-t
|-
! Lemma
| tarata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:taratithi|taratithi]] || [[word:taratiji|taratiji]] || [[word:taratishi|taratishi]] || [[word:tarati|tarati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:taratuthuth|taratuthuth]] || [[word:taratujuj|taratujuj]] || [[word:taratushush|taratushush]] || [[word:tarat|tarat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:taratuthu|taratuthu]] || [[word:taratuju|taratuju]] || [[word:taratushu|taratushu]] || [[word:taratu|taratu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:taratufuth|taratufuth]] || [[word:taratufuj|taratufuj]] || [[word:taratufush|taratufush]] || [[word:taratuf|taratuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:taratethe|taratethe]] || [[word:tarateje|tarateje]] || [[word:tarateshe|tarateshe]] || [[word:tarate|tarate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:taratothoth|taratothoth]] || [[word:taratojoj|taratojoj]] || [[word:taratoshosh|taratoshosh]] || [[word:tarat|tarat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:taratotho|taratotho]] || [[word:taratojo|taratojo]] || [[word:taratosho|taratosho]] || [[word:tarato|tarato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:taratofoth|taratofoth]] || [[word:taratofoj|taratofoj]] || [[word:taratofosh|taratofosh]] || [[word:taratof|taratof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:taratĂŻf|taratĂŻf]] || [[word:taratĂŻf|taratĂŻf]] || [[word:taratĂŻf|taratĂŻf]] || [[word:taratĂŻf|taratĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:taratĂŻfĂŻf|taratĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:taratĂŻfĂŻf|taratĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:taratĂŻfĂŻf|taratĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:taratĂŻfĂŻf|taratĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:taratĂŻf|taratĂŻf]] || [[word:taratĂŻf|taratĂŻf]] || [[word:taratĂŻf|taratĂŻf]] || [[word:taratĂŻf|taratĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:taratĂŻf|taratĂŻf]] || [[word:taratĂŻf|taratĂŻf]] || [[word:taratĂŻf|taratĂŻf]] || [[word:taratĂŻf|taratĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:taratĂŠthĂŠ|taratĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:taratĂŠjĂŠ|taratĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:taratĂŠshĂŠ|taratĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:taratĂŠ|taratĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:taratathath|taratathath]] || [[word:taratajaj|taratajaj]] || [[word:taratashash|taratashash]] || [[word:tarat|tarat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:taratatha|taratatha]] || [[word:tarataja|tarataja]] || [[word:taratasha|taratasha]] || [[word:tarata|tarata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:taratafath|taratafath]] || [[word:taratafaj|taratafaj]] || [[word:taratafash|taratafash]] || [[word:tarataf|tarataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:taratasha|taratasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gotaratasha|gotaratasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokitaratasha|gokitaratasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:taratnĂŒsha|taratnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gotaratnknĂŒsha|gotaratnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokitaratnĂŒsha|gokitaratnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:taratshĂ«sha|taratshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotaratnkshĂ«sha|gotaratnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitaratshĂ«sha|gokitaratshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:taratrosha|taratrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotaratnkrosha|gotaratnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitaratrosha|gokitaratrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:taratmusha|taratmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gotaratnkmusha|gotaratnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitaratmusha|gokitaratmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:taratsherasha|taratsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gotaratnksherasha|gotaratnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokitaratsherasha|gokitaratsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:taratngasha|taratngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gotaratnkngasha|gotaratnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokitaratngasha|gokitaratngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:taratyasha|taratyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gotaratnkyasha|gotaratnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokitaratyasha|gokitaratyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:taratyamasha|taratyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gotaratnkyamasha|gotaratnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokitaratyamasha|gokitaratyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:taratnĂŒshĂ«sha|taratnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotaratnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gotaratnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitaratnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokitaratnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:taratnĂŒrosha|taratnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotaratnknĂŒrosha|gotaratnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitaratnĂŒrosha|gokitaratnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:taratnĂŒmusha|taratnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotaratnknĂŒmusha|gotaratnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitaratnĂŒmusha|gokitaratnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:taratshĂ«nĂŒsha|taratshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotaratnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gotaratnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitaratshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokitaratshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:taratshĂ«rosha|taratshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotaratnkshĂ«rosha|gotaratnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitaratshĂ«rosha|gokitaratshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:taratshĂ«musha|taratshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotaratnkshĂ«musha|gotaratnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitaratshĂ«musha|gokitaratshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:taratronĂŒsha|taratronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotaratnkronĂŒsha|gotaratnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitaratronĂŒsha|gokitaratronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:taratroshĂ«sha|taratroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotaratnkroshĂ«sha|gotaratnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitaratroshĂ«sha|gokitaratroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:taratromusha|taratromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotaratnkromusha|gotaratnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitaratromusha|gokitaratromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:taratmunĂŒsha|taratmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotaratnkmunĂŒsha|gotaratnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitaratmunĂŒsha|gokitaratmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:taratmushĂ«sha|taratmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotaratnkmushĂ«sha|gotaratnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitaratmushĂ«sha|gokitaratmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:taratmurosha|taratmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotaratnkmurosha|gotaratnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitaratmurosha|gokitaratmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:tarat|tarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:tĂŠrĂŠt|tĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hotarat|hotarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hotĂŠrĂŠt|hotĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohotarat|hohotarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohotĂŠrĂŠt|hohotĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒtarat|nĂŒtarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒtĂŠrĂŠt|nĂŒtĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒtarat|nĂŒnĂŒtarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒtĂŠrĂŠt|nĂŒnĂŒtĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻtarat|nĂŻtarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻtĂŠrĂŠt|nĂŻtĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻtarat|nĂŻnĂŻtarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻtĂŠrĂŠt|nĂŻnĂŻtĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lutarat|lutarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lutĂŠrĂŠt|lutĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulutarat|lulutarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulutĂŠrĂŠt|lulutĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:litarat|litarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:litĂŠrĂŠt|litĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilitarat|lilitarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilitĂŠrĂŠt|lilitĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kotarat|kotarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kotĂŠrĂŠt|kotĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokotarat|kokotarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokotĂŠrĂŠt|kokotĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ketarat|ketarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ketĂŠrĂŠt|ketĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketarat|keketarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketĂŠrĂŠt|keketĂŠrĂŠt]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
